Connect to Google Sheets for live data

1
Open your Google Sheet → Extensions → Apps Script. In the TARTool.gs file paste the latest script. Save.
2
Deploy → New deployment. Web App · Execute as Me · Who has access: Anyone. Copy the URL.
3
Paste the URL below and click Connect. The tool fetches live and auto-refreshes every 5 minutes. Click Connect again at any time to force an immediate refresh.
2
Deploy → New deployment. Web App · Execute as Me · Who has access: Anyone. Copy the URL.
3
Paste the URL below and click Connect FCO. Once connected, use the scope toggle at the top to switch between Main, FCO and Combined views.
capacity function isMilestone(id,name){ // Note: numeric IDs (55.0, 1042.0 etc) are real activities in Nederland - do NOT filter by ID alone // Only filter by name keywords for actual milestone rows var kw=['MILESTONE','TAR START','TAR FINISH','PRE-TAR','POST-TAR','SHUTDOWN','BACK IN PIPE','PULLS & OPENINGS']; for(var i=0;i=0) return true; return false; } function parseDurH(dur, startStr){ if(!dur||dur==='0d') return 0; var dm=String(dur).match(/(\d+)d/), hm=String(dur).match(/(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)h/); var days=dm?parseInt(dm[1]):0, hours=hm?parseFloat(hm[1]):0; // 0d Xh = pure hour activity, done in one shift if(days===0) return hours; // Multi-day: use correct shift length var shift=12; if(startStr){ try{ var sd=startStr.slice(0,10); if(sdTAR_END_STR) shift=8; }catch(e){} } return days*shift+hours; } function calcHC(lh, durH){ if(!durH||durH<=0) return 0; return Math.round(lh/durH*10)/10; } window.addEventListener('load',function(){ // Load offline data first so page renders immediately loadData(offlinePayload()); // Pre-fill URL input var scriptInput=document.getElementById('script-url'); var connectUrl=liveUrl||DEFAULT_SCRIPT_URL||''; if(scriptInput) scriptInput.value=connectUrl; // Auto-connect to live data if(connectUrl){ fetchLive(connectUrl); } // Pre-fill FCO URL field var fcoInput=document.getElementById('fco-script-url'); if(fcoInput){ var storedFco=localStorage.getItem('tar_ned_fco_url')||''; var defaultFco=typeof DEFAULT_FCO_URL!=='undefined'?DEFAULT_FCO_URL:''; fcoInput.value=storedFco||defaultFco; } }); function offlinePayload(){ var wos=WO_RAW.map(function(w){ var woActs=(ACTS_RAW[w[0]]||[]).map(function(a){ // 15-field format: [id,name,plan_lh,fd,fs,dur,res[],start,finish,dur_h,actual_lh,pct,status,bl_finish,late_finish] var durH=a[9]||parseDurH(a[5],a[7]); var alh=a[10]||0; return{id:a[0],name:a[1],plan_lh:a[2],actual_lh:alh,pct:a[11]||0, fd:a[3],fs:a[4],dur:a[5],dur_h:durH, hc:calcHC(a[2],durH), res:a[6]||[],start:a[7]||'',finish:a[8]||'', bl_finish:a[13]||'',late_finish:a[14]||'', status:a[12]||'',notes:'',wo_id:w[0],eq:w[2]}; }); var act_lh=woActs.reduce(function(s,a){return s+(a.actual_lh||0);},0); return{id:w[0],name:w[1],eq:w[2],ph:w[3],ac:w[4], plan_lh:w[5],actual_lh:act_lh,mf:w[6],res:w[7], start:w[8],finish:w[9],acts:woActs}; }); return{wos:wos,scurve:null}; } function fetchLive(url){ setStatus('loading','Fetching live data… (may take 20-40 seconds)'); var cbName='_tarCb'+Date.now(); var script=document.createElement('script'); var done=false; var timeout=setTimeout(function(){ if(done)return; done=true; delete window[cbName]; try{document.body.removeChild(script);}catch(e){} setStatus('offline','Timed out — using offline data'); },60000); window[cbName]=function(data){ if(done)return; done=true; clearTimeout(timeout); delete window[cbName]; try{document.body.removeChild(script);}catch(e){} if(data.error){setStatus('offline','Error: '+data.error); return;} loadData(data); setStatus('live','Live — updated '+new Date().toLocaleTimeString()); if(refreshTimer) clearInterval(refreshTimer); refreshTimer = setInterval(function(){ fetchLive(url); }, 5*60*1000); }; script.onerror=function(){ if(done)return; done=true; clearTimeout(timeout); delete window[cbName]; setStatus('offline','Could not reach Apps Script — using offline data'); }; var sep=url.indexOf('?')>=0?'&':'?'; script.src=url+sep+'callback='+cbName+'&_='+Date.now(); document.body.appendChild(script); } function setStatus(type,msg){ document.getElementById('live-dot').className='live-dot'+(type==='live'?'':' offline-dot'); document.getElementById('data-status').textContent=msg; } function loadData(payload){ // Handle two payload formats: // 1. New format: {actuals: {actId: {...}}, ...} - merge into embedded baseline // 2. Old format: {wos: [...], scurve: [...]} - use directly var scurve = payload.scurve || null; if(payload.actuals){ // NEW FORMAT: merge live actuals into embedded WO_RAW baseline var actuals = payload.actuals; var wos = offlinePayload().wos; wos.forEach(function(wo){ wo.actual_lh = 0; (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ var live = actuals[a.id]; if(live){ a.actual_lh = live.actual_lh || 0; a.pct = live.pct || 0; a.status = live.status || ''; a.start = live.act_start || a.start; if(live.act_finish) a.finish = live.act_finish; if(live.early_finish) a.finish = live.act_finish || (live.early_finish+'T08:00'); if(live.late_finish) a.late_finish = live.late_finish; if(live.fd !== null && live.fd !== undefined) a.fd = live.fd; if(live.res && live.res.length) a.res = live.res; } wo.actual_lh += (a.actual_lh||0); }); wo.actual_lh = Math.round(wo.actual_lh); }); payload = {wos: wos, scurve: null}; scurve = null; } var wos=payload.wos; allWO=wos; mainWO=wos; ACT_INDEX={}; wos.forEach(function(wo){ (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ if(!a.dur_h) a.dur_h=parseDurH(a.dur,a.start); if(!a.hc) a.hc=calcHC(a.plan_lh,a.dur_h); }); ACT_INDEX[wo.id]=wo.acts||[]; }); allCP=[]; wos.forEach(function(wo){ (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ if(!EXCLUDE_CP[a.id]&&!isMilestone(a.id,a.name)) allCP.push({id:a.id,name:a.name,plan_lh:a.plan_lh,actual_lh:a.actual_lh||0, pct:a.pct||0,fd:a.fd,fs:a.fs,dur:a.dur,dur_h:a.dur_h||0,hc:a.hc||0, res:a.res||[],start:a.start,finish:a.finish, status:a.status||'',notes:a.notes||'', wo_id:wo.id,wo_name:wo.name,eq:a.eq||wo.eq}); }); }); buildResData(); buildFilters(); filteredWO=[].concat(allWO); filterWO(); filterRes(); filterCP(); buildCPStats(); var nc=allCP.filter(function(a){return a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=3;}).length; var ur=allCP.filter(function(a){return !a.res||!a.res.length;}).length; document.getElementById('badge-acts').textContent=allCP.length.toLocaleString()+' activities'; document.getElementById('badge-wos').textContent=allWO.length.toLocaleString()+' work orders'; document.getElementById('badge-nc').textContent=nc+' near-critical'; document.getElementById('badge-ur').textContent=ur+' unresourced'; // Always recompute charts from merged WO data // (actuals-only payload has no pre-computed scurve) computeLiveCharts(); initProgressDates(); buildSCStats(); renderSC(activeSC); updateSCPctComplete(activeSC); renderResHistogram(); } function buildResData(){ RES_DATA.length=0; var rm={}; allWO.forEach(function(wo){ (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ (a.res||[]).forEach(function(r){ if(!rm[r])rm[r]={name:r,wos:{},acts:0,lh:0,actual_lh:0,nc:0}; rm[r].wos[wo.id]=true; rm[r].acts++; rm[r].lh+=a.plan_lh||0; rm[r].actual_lh+=a.actual_lh||0; if(a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=3&&!EXCLUDE_CP[a.id])rm[r].nc++; }); }); }); var keys=Object.keys(rm); for(var i=0;i1)el.remove(1);} }); var phases=[]; var eqs=[]; allWO.forEach(function(w){ if(phases.indexOf(w.ph)<0)phases.push(w.ph); if(eqs.indexOf(w.eq)<0)eqs.push(w.eq); }); phases.sort().forEach(function(p){document.getElementById('wo-phase').add(new Option(p,p));}); eqs.sort().forEach(function(e){ document.getElementById('wo-eq').add(new Option(e,e)); document.getElementById('cp-eq').add(new Option(e,e)); var scEq=document.getElementById('sc-eq-filter'); if(scEq) scEq.add(new Option(e,e)); }); var resNames=RES_DATA.map(function(r){return r.name;}).sort(); resNames.forEach(function(r){ document.getElementById('cp-res').add(new Option(r,r)); document.getElementById('hist-res-select').add(new Option(r,r)); var woRes=document.getElementById('wo-res'); if(woRes) woRes.add(new Option(r,r)); }); } var fc=function(f){return f==null?'#aaa':f===0?'#E24B4A':f<=3?'#EF9F27':f<=10?'#378ADD':'#1D9E75';}; function riskBadge(wo){ if(!wo.res||!wo.res.length)return'Unresourced'; if(wo.mf===0)return'Critical'; if(wo.mf!=null&&wo.mf<=3)return'Near-critical'; if(wo.mf!=null&&wo.mf<=10)return'Low float'; return'OK'; } function sn(r){return r.replace(/-FPT ASU\s*3?/gi,'').trim();} function fmtD(s){if(!s)return'—';var p=s.split('-');return p.length===3?p[2]+'/'+p[1]:s;} function hcBadge(hc){ if(!hc||hc<=0)return''; var cls=hc>=10?'high':hc>=5?'med':''; return''+hc+' ppl'; } // ---- WO Tab ---- function renderWOStats(wos){ var lh=0,alh=0,nc=0,ur=0; wos.forEach(function(w){lh+=w.plan_lh;alh+=w.actual_lh||0;if(w.mf!=null&&w.mf<=3)nc++;if(!w.res||!w.res.length)ur++;}); document.getElementById('wo-stats').innerHTML= '
Work orders
'+wos.length.toLocaleString()+'
'+ '
Plan hrs
'+lh.toLocaleString()+'
'+ '
Actual hrs
'+alh.toLocaleString()+'
'+ '
Near-critical WOs
'+nc+'
'+ '
Unresourced WOs
'+ur+'
'; } function filterWO(){ woPage=0; var q=document.getElementById('wo-search').value.toLowerCase(); var ph=document.getElementById('wo-phase').value; var eq=document.getElementById('wo-eq').value; var risk=document.getElementById('wo-risk').value; var woResEl=document.getElementById('wo-res'); var woResFilter=woResEl?woResEl.value:''; var sort=document.getElementById('wo-sort').value; var res=[].concat(allWO); if(q)res=res.filter(function(w){return w.name.toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0||w.id.toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0|| (ACT_INDEX[w.id]||[]).some(function(a){return a.id.toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0||a.name.toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0;});}); if(ph)res=res.filter(function(w){return w.ph===ph;}); if(eq)res=res.filter(function(w){return w.eq===eq;}); if(risk==='nc')res=res.filter(function(w){return w.mf!=null&&w.mf<=3;}); else if(risk==='warn')res=res.filter(function(w){return w.mf!=null&&w.mf<=10;}); else if(risk==='nr')res=res.filter(function(w){return !w.res||!w.res.length;}); if(woResFilter){ res=res.filter(function(w){ return (ACT_INDEX[w.id]||[]).some(function(a){ return (a.res||[]).some(function(r){return r===woResFilter||r.toLowerCase().indexOf(woResFilter.toLowerCase())>=0;}); }); }); } window.activeWOResFilter=woResFilter; var parts=sort.split('_'),sf=parts[0],dir=parts[1]==='asc'?1:-1; res.sort(function(a,b){ var va=sf==='mf'?(a.mf==null?999:a.mf):sf==='lh'?a.plan_lh:sf==='actual_lh'?(a.actual_lh||0):sf==='ac'?a.ac:(a[sf]||''); var vb=sf==='mf'?(b.mf==null?999:b.mf):sf==='lh'?b.plan_lh:sf==='actual_lh'?(b.actual_lh||0):sf==='ac'?b.ac:(b[sf]||''); return dir*(vavb?1:0); }); filteredWO=res; renderWOStats(res); renderWOTable(); } function sortWO(f){ var s=document.getElementById('wo-sort'),parts=s.value.split('_'),cf=parts[0],cd=parts[1]; s.value=f+'_'+(cf===f&&cd==='asc'?'desc':'asc'); filterWO(); } function renderWOTable(){ var tbody=document.getElementById('wo-tbody'); var page=filteredWO.slice(woPage*WPS,(woPage+1)*WPS); if(!page.length){tbody.innerHTML='No work orders match.';renderPager();return;} tbody.innerHTML=page.map(function(wo){ var f=fc(wo.mf); var fd=wo.mf!=null?''+wo.mf.toFixed(1)+'d':'—'; var rd=wo.res&&wo.res.length?wo.res.map(function(r){return''+sn(r)+'';}).join(''):'Not assigned'; var pct=wo.plan_lh>0?Math.min(100,Math.round((wo.actual_lh||0)/wo.plan_lh*100)):0; var desc=wo.name.replace(/^W-\d+\s*/,''); return''+ ''+wo.id+''+ ''+(desc.length>65?desc.slice(0,65)+'…':desc)+''+ ''+wo.eq+''+ ''+wo.ph.replace('-Turnaround','')+''+ ''+fmtD(wo.start)+''+ ''+fmtD(wo.finish)+''+ ''+wo.ac+''+ ''+wo.plan_lh.toLocaleString()+''+ ''+(wo.actual_lh||0).toLocaleString()+(wo.plan_lh>0?'
':'')+''+ ''+fd+''+ ''+rd+''+ ''+riskBadge(wo)+''+ ''; }).join(''); renderPager(); } function renderPager(){ var total=filteredWO.length,pages=Math.ceil(total/WPS); var pg=document.getElementById('wo-pager'); if(pages<=1){pg.innerHTML=''+total+' work order'+(total!==1?'s':'')+'';return;} pg.innerHTML=''+ 'Page '+(woPage+1)+' of '+pages+' ('+total+')'+ ''; } function woGo(p){woPage=p;renderWOTable();} function selectWO(id){ document.querySelectorAll('#wo-tbody tr').forEach(function(r){r.classList.remove('selected');}); var row=document.getElementById('wo-row-'+id); if(row)row.classList.add('selected'); renderWODetail(allWO.filter(function(w){return w.id===id;})[0], ACT_INDEX[id]||[]); } function renderWODetail(wo,acts){ var det=document.getElementById('wo-detail'); var nc=acts.filter(function(a){return a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=3;}); var ur=acts.filter(function(a){return !a.res||!a.res.length;}); var plan_lh=0,actual_lh=0; acts.forEach(function(a){plan_lh+=a.plan_lh||0;actual_lh+=a.actual_lh||0;}); var resF=window.activeWOResFilter||''; var sorted=[].concat(acts).sort(function(a,b){return(a.fd==null?999:a.fd)-(b.fd==null?999:b.fd);}); if(resF){ // Put matching resource activities first sorted.sort(function(a,b){ var am=(a.res||[]).some(function(r){return r===resF||r.toLowerCase().indexOf(resF.toLowerCase())>=0;})?0:1; var bm=(b.res||[]).some(function(r){return r===resF||r.toLowerCase().indexOf(resF.toLowerCase())>=0;})?0:1; if(am!==bm) return am-bm; return (a.fd==null?999:a.fd)-(b.fd==null?999:b.fd); }); } var sharedRes=wo.res||[]; var impacted=[]; sharedRes.length&&allWO.forEach(function(other){ if(other.id===wo.id)return; var shared=(other.res||[]).filter(function(r){return sharedRes.indexOf(r)>=0;}); if(shared.length&&other.mf!=null&&other.mf<=10)impacted.push({wo:other,shared:shared}); }); impacted.sort(function(a,b){return(a.wo.mf==null?999:a.wo.mf)-(b.wo.mf==null?999:b.wo.mf);}); var riskHtml=(nc.length||ur.length)?'
Risk flags
'+ (nc.length?'
● '+nc.length+' near-critical activit'+(nc.length>1?'ies':'y')+'
':'')+ (ur.length?'
● '+ur.length+' unresourced
':'')+ '
':''; var impactHtml=impacted.length?'
Shared resource impact — '+impacted.length+' other at-risk WO'+(impacted.length>1?'s':'')+'
'+ impacted.slice(0,5).map(function(x){return'
'+x.wo.id+' — '+(x.wo.mf!=null?x.wo.mf.toFixed(1):''+'d')+' float — shared: '+x.shared.map(sn).join(', ')+'
';}).join('')+ (impacted.length>5?'
+'+(impacted.length-5)+' more…
':'')+ '
':''; var actRows=sorted.map(function(a){ var resMatch=resF&&(a.res||[]).some(function(r){return r===resF||r.toLowerCase().indexOf(resF.toLowerCase())>=0;}); var pct=a.plan_lh>0?Math.min(100,Math.round((a.actual_lh||0)/a.plan_lh*100)):0; var rd=a.res&&a.res.length?a.res.map(function(r){return''+r+'';}).join(''):'Unresourced'; var sc={Complete:'#1D9E75','In Progress':'#EF9F27'}[a.status]; return''+ ''+a.id+''+ ''+a.name+''+ ''+fmtD(a.start)+''+fmtD(a.finish)+''+ ''+a.dur+''+ ''+a.plan_lh+'h'+ ''+hcBadge(a.hc)+''+ ''+(a.actual_lh||0)+'h'+(a.plan_lh>0?'
':'')+''+ ''+( a.fs||'—')+''+ ''+(a.status&&sc?''+a.status+'':'')+''+ ''+rd+''; }).join(''); det.innerHTML='
'+ '

'+wo.id+'

'+wo.name.replace(/^W-\d+\s*/,'')+'

'+wo.eq+' · '+wo.ph+' · '+acts.length+' activities · '+fmtD(wo.start)+' → '+fmtD(wo.finish)+' · Plan: '+plan_lh.toLocaleString()+'h · Actual: '+actual_lh.toLocaleString()+'h · Float: '+(wo.mf!=null?wo.mf.toFixed(1)+'d':'—')+'

'; } // ---- Resources Tab ---- function filterRes(){ var q=document.getElementById('res-search').value.toLowerCase(); var sf=document.getElementById('res-sort').value; var res=[].concat(RES_DATA); if(q)res=res.filter(function(r){return r.name.toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0;}); res.sort(function(a,b){var v=sf==='lh'?'lh':sf==='acts'?'acts':sf==='wo'?'wo_count':'nc';return b[v]-a[v];}); filteredRes=res; renderResStats(); renderResTable(); } function renderResStats(){ var lh=filteredRes.reduce(function(s,r){return s+r.lh;},0); var nc=filteredRes.filter(function(r){return r.nc>0;}).length; document.getElementById('res-stats').innerHTML= '
Resources
'+filteredRes.length+'
'+ '
Plan hrs
'+lh.toLocaleString()+'
'+ '
On near-critical
'+nc+'
'+ '
Highest load
'+(filteredRes[0]?filteredRes[0].name.replace(/-FPT ASU\s*3?/gi,'').trim():'—')+'
'; } function renderResTable(){ var maxLH=filteredRes.length?filteredRes[0].lh:1; var tbody=document.getElementById('res-tbody'); if(!filteredRes.length){tbody.innerHTML='No resources found.';return;} tbody.innerHTML=filteredRes.map(function(r){ var pct=Math.round(r.lh/maxLH*100); var apct=r.lh>0?Math.min(100,Math.round(r.actual_lh/r.lh*100)):0; var ncCell=r.nc?''+r.nc+'':'0'; return''+ ''+r.name+''+ ''+r.wo_count+''+ ''+r.acts.toLocaleString()+''+ ''+r.lh.toLocaleString()+''+ ''+r.actual_lh.toLocaleString()+(r.lh>0?'
':'')+''+ ''+ncCell+''+ '
'+ ''; }).join(''); } function selectRes(name){ // Show in resource loading tab document.getElementById('hist-res-select').value=name; switchTab('reshistogram',document.querySelector('[data-tab=reshistogram]')); renderResHistogram(); } // ---- Resource Loading Histogram ---- function toggleHistRange(range){ histRange=range; document.getElementById('hist-btn-tar').style.background=range==='tar'?'#1E3A5F':'#fff'; document.getElementById('hist-btn-tar').style.color=range==='tar'?'#fff':'#333'; document.getElementById('hist-btn-tar').style.borderColor=range==='tar'?'#1E3A5F':'#ddd'; document.getElementById('hist-btn-full').style.background=range==='full'?'#1E3A5F':'#fff'; document.getElementById('hist-btn-full').style.color=range==='full'?'#fff':'#333'; document.getElementById('hist-btn-full').style.borderColor=range==='full'?'#1E3A5F':'#ddd'; renderResHistogram(); } function renderResHistogram(){ var resName=document.getElementById('hist-res-select').value; var cap=parseInt(document.getElementById('hist-cap').value)||0; // Get date range var rangeStart=histRange==='tar'?TAR_START_STR:CHART_META.overall_start; var rangeEnd=histRange==='tar'?TAR_END_STR:CHART_META.overall_end; // Build day list var days=[]; var d=new Date(rangeStart+'T00:00:00'); var dEnd=new Date(rangeEnd+'T00:00:00'); while(d<=dEnd){ days.push(d.toISOString().slice(0,10)); d.setDate(d.getDate()+1); } // Get headcount data var dayMap={}; days.forEach(function(dk){dayMap[dk]=0;}); var activeHist=window.activeResHist||window.liveResHist||RES_HIST; if(resName==='ALL'){ Object.keys(activeHist).forEach(function(r){ activeHist[r].forEach(function(p){if(dayMap.hasOwnProperty(p.date))dayMap[p.date]+=p.hc;}); }); } else { var hist=activeHist[resName]||[]; hist.forEach(function(p){if(dayMap.hasOwnProperty(p.date))dayMap[p.date]=p.hc;}); } var labels=days.map(function(dk){return dk.slice(8)+'/'+dk.slice(5,7);}); var vals=days.map(function(dk){return Math.round(dayMap[dk]*10)/10;}); var peak=Math.max.apply(null,vals); var peakDay=days[vals.indexOf(peak)]; var overloadDays=cap>0?days.filter(function(dk){return dayMap[dk]>cap;}).length:0; var totalHC=Math.round(vals.reduce(function(s,v){return s+v;},0)); // Stats document.getElementById('hist-title').textContent=(resName==='ALL'?'All resources combined':resName)+' — headcount per day'; document.getElementById('hist-stats').innerHTML= '
Peak day
'+(peakDay?fmtD(peakDay):'—')+'
'+ (cap>0?'
Overloaded days
'+overloadDays+'
':'')+ '
Avg headcount
'+(days.length?Math.round(totalHC/days.length*10)/10:0)+'
'; // Overload note var overloadEl=document.getElementById('hist-overload'); if(cap>0&&overloadDays>0){ var overDays=days.filter(function(dk){return dayMap[dk]>cap;}); overloadEl.innerHTML='
⚠ '+overloadDays+' day'+(overloadDays>1?'s':'')+' exceed capacity of '+cap+' — worst: '+fmtD(overDays[0])+' ('+Math.round(dayMap[overDays[0]]*10)/10+' people needed). Consider shifting activities on these days to flatten the curve.
'; } else { overloadEl.innerHTML=''; } // Build chart var barColors=vals.map(function(v){return cap>0&&v>cap?'rgba(226,75,74,0.8)':'rgba(55,138,221,0.7)';}); var borderColors=vals.map(function(v){return cap>0&&v>cap?'#E24B4A':'#378ADD';}); if(activeHistChart){activeHistChart.destroy();activeHistChart=null;} var ctx=document.getElementById('hist-canvas').getContext('2d'); var datasets=[{ type:'bar',label:'Headcount',data:vals, backgroundColor:barColors,borderColor:borderColors,borderWidth:1,borderRadius:2 }]; if(cap>0){ datasets.push({ type:'line',label:'Capacity', data:days.map(function(){return cap;}), borderColor:'#1E3A5F',backgroundColor:'transparent', borderWidth:2,borderDash:[6,3],pointRadius:0,tension:0 }); } activeHistChart=new Chart(ctx,{ data:{labels:labels,datasets:datasets}, options:{ responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false, plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{mode:'index',intersect:false, callbacks:{label:function(c){ if(c.dataset.type==='line')return' Capacity: '+c.parsed.y; return' Headcount: '+c.parsed.y+(cap>0&&c.parsed.y>cap?' ⚠ OVER':''); }} }}, scales:{ x:{grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.04)'},ticks:{font:{size:10},maxRotation:45,autoSkip:true,maxTicksLimit:20}}, y:{beginAtZero:true,grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.04)'},ticks:{font:{size:11}}, title:{display:true,text:'Headcount (people)',font:{size:11}}} }, onClick:function(evt,items){ if(items.length>0){ var idx=items[0].index; var dayStr=days[idx]; showDayDetail(resName,dayStr); } } } }); } function showDayDetail(resName, dayStr){ // Find all activities running on this day for this resource var matching=[]; allWO.forEach(function(wo){ (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ if(isMilestone(a.id,a.name)) return; if(resName!=='ALL'&&(a.res||[]).indexOf(resName)<0) return; if(!a.start||!a.finish) return; if(a.start.slice(0,10)<=dayStr&&a.finish.slice(0,10)>=dayStr){ matching.push({a:a,wo:wo}); } }); }); matching.sort(function(x,y){return(x.a.fd==null?999:x.a.fd)-(y.a.fd==null?999:y.a.fd);}); var totalHC=matching.reduce(function(s,x){return s+(x.a.hc||0);},0); var rows=matching.map(function(x){ var a=x.a; return''+ ''+a.id+''+ ''+a.name+''+ ''+x.wo.id+''+ ''+a.eq+''+ ''+fmtD(a.start)+''+fmtD(a.finish)+''+ ''+a.dur+''+ ''+a.plan_lh+'h'+ ''+hcBadge(a.hc)+''+ ''+(a.fs||'—')+''+ ''+(a.res||[]).map(function(r){return''+sn(r)+'';}).join('')+''+ ''; }).join(''); document.getElementById('hist-day-detail').innerHTML='
'+ '
'+ '
'+fmtD(dayStr)+' — '+(resName==='ALL'?'All resources':resName)+'
'+ '
'+matching.length+' activities running · '+Math.round(totalHC*10)/10+' total headcount required
'+ ''+ '
'+ '
'+ '
'+ ''+ ''+rows+'
IDNameWO #EquipmentStartFinishDurPlan hrsHeadcountFloatResources
'+ '
'+ '
'; } // ---- Critical Path ---- function buildCPStats(){ var nc=allCP.filter(function(a){return a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=3;}); var ur=allCP.filter(function(a){return !a.res||!a.res.length;}); var lh=allCP.reduce(function(s,a){return s+(a.plan_lh||0);},0); document.getElementById('cp-nc').textContent=nc.length; document.getElementById('cp-ur').textContent=ur.length; document.getElementById('cp-wo').textContent=nc.reduce(function(s,a){s[a.wo_id]=1;return s;},{}); document.getElementById('cp-wo').textContent=Object.keys(nc.reduce(function(s,a){s[a.wo_id]=1;return s;},{})).length; document.getElementById('cp-lh').textContent=lh.toLocaleString()+'h'; } function filterCP(){ var f=document.getElementById('cp-filter').value; var eq=document.getElementById('cp-eq').value; var res=document.getElementById('cp-res').value; var acts=[].concat(allCP); if(f==='nc')acts=acts.filter(function(a){return a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=3;}); else if(f==='nr')acts=acts.filter(function(a){return !a.res||!a.res.length;}); else acts=acts.filter(function(a){return(a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=3)||(!a.res||!a.res.length);}); if(eq)acts=acts.filter(function(a){return a.eq===eq;}); if(res)acts=acts.filter(function(a){return a.res&&a.res.indexOf(res)>=0;}); acts.sort(function(a,b){return(a.fd==null?999:a.fd)-(b.fd==null?999:b.fd);}); filteredCP=acts; renderCPTable(); } function renderCPTable(){ var tbody=document.getElementById('cp-tbody'); if(!filteredCP.length){tbody.innerHTML='No activities match.';return;} tbody.innerHTML=filteredCP.map(function(a){ var rd=a.res&&a.res.length?a.res.map(function(r){return''+r+'';}).join(''):'⚠ Unresourced'; var pct=a.plan_lh>0?Math.min(100,Math.round((a.actual_lh||0)/a.plan_lh*100)):0; var sc={Complete:'#1D9E75','In Progress':'#EF9F27'}[a.status]; return''+ ''+a.id+''+ ''+a.name+''+ ''+a.wo_id+''+ ''+a.eq+''+ ''+fmtD(a.start)+''+fmtD(a.finish)+''+ ''+a.dur+''+ ''+a.plan_lh+'h'+ ''+hcBadge(a.hc)+''+ ''+(a.fs||'—')+''+ ''+(a.status&&sc?''+a.status+''+(a.plan_lh>0?'
':''):'—')+''+ ''+rd+''; }).join(''); } // ---- S-curves ---- var SC_CFG={ lh:{title:'Labor hours S-curve — early / baseline / late / actual', sub:'Cumulative manhours · 🔵 Early finish (best case) · ⬛ Baseline (planned) · 🔴 Late finish (worst case) · 🟢 Actual', legend:[{c:'#E24B4A',l:'Late finish (worst case)'},{c:'#1E3A5F',l:'Baseline (planned)'},{c:'#378ADD',l:'Early finish (best case)'},{c:'#1D9E75',l:'Actual'}], three_curve:true, field:'lh'}, acts:{title:'Activity completions S-curve — early / baseline / late / actual', sub:'Cumulative activity count · 🔵 Early finish · ⬛ Baseline · 🔴 Late finish · 🟢 Actual', legend:[{c:'#E24B4A',l:'Late finish'},{c:'#1E3A5F',l:'Baseline'},{c:'#378ADD',l:'Early finish'},{c:'#1D9E75',l:'Actual'}], three_curve:true, field:'acts'}, cp:{title:'Critical path S-curve — manhours (early / baseline / late / actual)', sub:'Near-critical (≤3d float) cumulative manhours · 🔵 Early · ⬛ Baseline · 🔴 Late · 🟢 Actual', legend:[{c:'#E24B4A',l:'Late finish'},{c:'#1E3A5F',l:'Baseline'},{c:'#378ADD',l:'Early finish'},{c:'#1D9E75',l:'Actual'}], three_curve:true, field:'cp'}, cp_acts:{title:'Critical path S-curve — activities (early / baseline / late / actual)', sub:'Near-critical (≤3d float) cumulative activity count · 🔵 Early · ⬛ Baseline · 🔴 Late · 🟢 Actual', legend:[{c:'#E24B4A',l:'Late finish'},{c:'#1E3A5F',l:'Baseline'},{c:'#378ADD',l:'Early finish'},{c:'#1D9E75',l:'Actual'}], three_curve:true, field:'cp_acts'}, hist:{title:'Activities per day — planned vs actual', sub:'Activities planned vs actually completing each day · click any bar to see detail', legend:[{c:'rgba(55,138,221,.6)',l:'Planned'},{c:'rgba(29,158,117,.8)',l:'Actual'},{c:'#185FA5',l:'5-day rolling avg (plan)'}], mixed:true}, float:{title:'Schedule float — burn-down', sub:'Average remaining float (days) across all TAR activities over the window', legend:[{c:'#854F0B',l:'Avg float (days)'}], ds:function(pts){return[ {label:'Avg float',data:pts.map(function(p){return p.avg_float;}),borderColor:'#854F0B',backgroundColor:'rgba(133,79,11,.07)',fill:true,tension:.35,pointRadius:0,borderWidth:2.5} ];},yMin:0,yLabel:'Float (days)'}, combined_lh:{title:'Combined S-curve — Main Scope + FCO (cumulative manhours)', sub:'Main scope (navy/blue/red bands) + FCO actual (amber) + Combined total (green)', legend:[{c:'#1E3A5F',l:'Main baseline'},{c:'#C47B1A',l:'FCO actual'},{c:'#1D9E75',l:'Combined total'}], combined:true} }; function computeLiveCharts(){ // Flatten ALL activities from live data var acts=[]; allWO.forEach(function(wo){ (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ acts.push(a); }); }); if(!acts.length) return; // Get full date range from live data var minStart=null, maxFinish=null; acts.forEach(function(a){ if(a.start&&a.start.length>=10){ var s=a.start.slice(0,10); if(!minStart||s=10){ var f=a.finish.slice(0,10); if(!maxFinish||f>maxFinish) maxFinish=f; } }); var overallStart=minStart||'2026-04-13'; var overallEnd=maxFinish||'2026-07-03'; // Build FULL schedule day list (April to July) // Always start from the overall project start so curves begin at 0 var projectStart = (window.liveMeta||CHART_META).overall_start || overallStart; var projectEnd = (window.liveMeta||CHART_META).overall_end || overallEnd; // Use project start if earlier than equipment start (so x-axis is consistent) var rangeStart = projectStart < overallStart ? projectStart : overallStart; var rangeEnd = projectEnd > overallEnd ? projectEnd : overallEnd; var allDays=buildDayList(rangeStart, rangeEnd); // Buckets for every day in full range var planLHByDay={}, planActByDay={}, actualLHByDay={}, actualActByDay={}; var earlyLHByDay={}, earlyActByDay={}, earlyCPByDay={}; var lateLHByDay={}, lateActByDay={}, lateCPByDay={}; var histByDay={}, cpByDay={}, actualCPByDay={}; allDays.forEach(function(dk){ planLHByDay[dk]=0; planActByDay[dk]=0; actualLHByDay[dk]=0; actualActByDay[dk]=0; earlyLHByDay[dk]=0; earlyActByDay[dk]=0; earlyCPByDay[dk]=0; lateLHByDay[dk]=0; lateActByDay[dk]=0; lateCPByDay[dk]=0; histByDay[dk]=0; cpByDay[dk]=0; actualCPByDay[dk]=0; }); var totalPlanLH=0, totalActs=0, totalCPActs=0; acts.forEach(function(a){ if(isMilestone(a.id,a.name)) return; totalPlanLH+=a.plan_lh||0; totalActs++; var isCP=a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=3&&!EXCLUDE_CP[a.id]; if(isCP) totalCPActs++; var sd=a.start?a.start.slice(0,10):''; var fd=a.finish?a.finish.slice(0,10):''; if(!sd||!fd) return; // Clamp finish to start if inverted (schedule revision artefact) if(fd=100||a.status==='Complete'); var actFd=a.status==='Complete'&&a.finish?a.finish.slice(0,10):null; if(isComplete&&actFd&&actualActByDay.hasOwnProperty(actFd)) actualActByDay[actFd]++; if(isCP&&isComplete&&actFd&&actualCPByDay.hasOwnProperty(actFd)) actualCPByDay[actFd]++; // Actual hours - distribute using actual finish date if complete, else forecast var lhActFd=actFd||fd; if(a.actual_lh>0&&actualLHByDay.hasOwnProperty(lhActFd)){ actualLHByDay[lhActFd]+=a.actual_lh; } // Early finish date - use a.finish (rem_early priority from Apps Script) var earlyFd=fd; if(earlyActByDay.hasOwnProperty(earlyFd)) earlyActByDay[earlyFd]++; if(isCP&&earlyCPByDay.hasOwnProperty(earlyFd)) earlyCPByDay[earlyFd]++; // Late finish date - use a.late_finish if available, else BL finish var lateFd=a.late_finish?a.late_finish.slice(0,10):blFd; if(lateActByDay.hasOwnProperty(lateFd)) lateActByDay[lateFd]++; if(isCP&&lateCPByDay.hasOwnProperty(lateFd)) lateCPByDay[lateFd]++; // Distribute planned labor - baseline uses BL finish, early uses rem_early, late uses rem_late var blFd=a.bl_finish?a.bl_finish.slice(0,10):fd; var blSd=a.bl_start?a.bl_start.slice(0,10):sd; // Baseline curve (BL dates) var blDays=[]; var d=new Date(blSd+'T00:00:00'); var blEnd=new Date(blFd+'T00:00:00'); while(d<=blEnd){var k=fmtDateJS(d);if(planLHByDay.hasOwnProperty(k))blDays.push(k);d.setDate(d.getDate()+1);} if(blDays.length>0){var lhd=(a.plan_lh||0)/blDays.length;blDays.forEach(function(k){planLHByDay[k]+=lhd;});} // Early curve (rem_early finish) var eDays=[]; var d=new Date(sd+'T00:00:00'); var eEnd=new Date(earlyFd+'T00:00:00'); while(d<=eEnd){var k=fmtDateJS(d);if(earlyLHByDay.hasOwnProperty(k))eDays.push(k);d.setDate(d.getDate()+1);} if(eDays.length>0){var lhd=(a.plan_lh||0)/eDays.length;eDays.forEach(function(k){earlyLHByDay[k]+=lhd;});} // Late curve (rem_late finish) var lateDays=[]; var d=new Date(sd+'T00:00:00'); var lEnd=new Date(lateFd+'T00:00:00'); while(d<=lEnd){var k=fmtDateJS(d);if(lateLHByDay.hasOwnProperty(k))lateDays.push(k);d.setDate(d.getDate()+1);} if(lateDays.length>0){var lhd=(a.plan_lh||0)/lateDays.length;lateDays.forEach(function(k){lateLHByDay[k]+=lhd;});} }); // Float pool for burn-down (TAR window only) var tarActsFloat=acts.filter(function(a){ return a.fd!=null&&a.finish&& a.finish.slice(0,10)>=TAR_START_STR&& a.finish.slice(0,10)<=TAR_END_STR&& !isMilestone(a.id,a.name); }); // Build cumulative chart points over FULL date range var cumPLH=0,cumALH=0,cumPA=0,cumAA=0,cumCP=0,cumACP=0; var cumELH=0,cumEA=0,cumECP=0,cumLLH=0,cumLA=0,cumLCP=0; var pts=allDays.map(function(dk){ cumPLH+=planLHByDay[dk]||0; cumALH+=actualLHByDay[dk]||0; cumPA+=planActByDay[dk]||0; cumAA+=actualActByDay[dk]||0; cumCP+=cpByDay[dk]||0; cumACP+=actualCPByDay[dk]||0; cumELH+=earlyLHByDay[dk]||0; cumEA+=earlyActByDay[dk]||0; cumECP+=earlyCPByDay[dk]||0; cumLLH+=lateLHByDay[dk]||0; cumLA+=lateActByDay[dk]||0; cumLCP+=lateCPByDay[dk]||0; // Float burn-down var dayDate=new Date(dk+'T00:00:00'); var rem=tarActsFloat.filter(function(a){ return new Date(a.finish.slice(0,10)+'T00:00:00')>=dayDate; }); var avgFloat=null; if(rem.length>0){ var sf=0; rem.forEach(function(a){if(a.fd!=null)sf+=a.fd;}); avgFloat=Math.round(sf/rem.length*10)/10; } return{ date:dk, label:dk.slice(8)+'/'+dk.slice(5,7), plan_lh:Math.round(cumPLH), early_lh:Math.round(cumELH), late_lh:Math.round(cumLLH), actual_lh:Math.round(cumALH), plan_acts:cumPA, early_acts:cumEA, late_acts:cumLA, actual_acts:cumAA, plan_cp:cumCP, early_cp:cumECP, late_cp:cumLCP, actual_cp:cumACP, hist:histByDay[dk]||0, actual_hist:actualActByDay[dk]||0, avg_float:dk>=TAR_START_STR&&dk<=TAR_END_STR?avgFloat:null }; }); window.chartPoints=pts; // Update live meta window.liveMeta={ total_plan_lh:Math.round(totalPlanLH), total_plan_acts:totalActs, total_cp_acts:totalCPActs, overall_start:overallStart, overall_end:overallEnd }; // Build resource histogram using TIME-AWARE PEAK CONCURRENT method // For each resource, for each hour of each day, count concurrent crew // Daily headcount = peak concurrent crew at any hour that day var liveHourly={}; // res -> hour_key -> headcount allWO.forEach(function(wo){ (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ if(isMilestone(a.id,a.name)||!a.start||!a.finish||!a.res||!a.res.length) return; var lh=a.plan_lh||0; if(!lh) return; if(!a.res||!a.res.length) return; // Parse start and finish datetimes (preserve time if available) var startDT=parseActivityDT(a.start); var finishDT=parseActivityDT(a.finish); if(!startDT||!finishDT) return; // Use Original Duration for headcount (not wall-clock time) // This matches P6: headcount = Budgeted Labor Units / Original Duration var durH=a.dur_h||parseDurH(a.dur,a.start); if(!durH||durH<=0) return; // Headcount = budget / duration, split per resource var hcPerRes=(lh/durH)/a.res.length; if(hcPerRes<=0) return; // Walk each hour the activity runs var cur=new Date(startDT.getTime()); cur.setMinutes(0,0,0); while(cur=TAR_START_STR&&dk<=TAR_END_STR; var dow=cur.getDay(); var isWorkDay=isTar||(dow>0&&dow<6); if(isWorkDay){ var h=cur.getHours(); var shiftEnd=isTar?20:17; if(h>=8&&hdaily[dk]) daily[dk]=v; }); liveHist[r]=daily; }); window.liveResHist={}; Object.keys(liveHist).forEach(function(r){ window.liveResHist[r]=Object.keys(liveHist[r]).sort().map(function(dk){ return{date:dk,hc:Math.round(liveHist[r][dk]*10)/10}; }); }); // Also update RES_HIST reference so offline histogram tab uses same data window.activeResHist=window.liveResHist; // Update peak headcount in RES_DATA RES_DATA.forEach(function(r){ }); } function buildDayList(startStr,endStr){ var days=[]; var d=new Date(startStr+'T00:00:00'); var end=new Date(endStr+'T00:00:00'); while(d<=end){days.push(fmtDateJS(d));d.setDate(d.getDate()+1);} return days; } function fmtDateJS(d){ var mo=d.getMonth()+1,dy=d.getDate(); return d.getFullYear()+'-'+(mo<10?'0'+mo:mo)+'-'+(dy<10?'0'+dy:dy); } function parseActivityDT(s){ // Parse P6 datetime string: "2026-04-13" or "2026-04-13T08:00" // Returns Date object if(!s) return null; try{ if(s.indexOf('T')>=0) return new Date(s); return new Date(s+'T08:00:00'); }catch(e){ return null; } } // Multi-line equipment type S-curve function renderThreeCurve(cfg, pts, eqFilter){ if(activeScChart){activeScChart.destroy();activeScChart=null;} var ctx=document.getElementById('sc-canvas').getContext('2d'); var labels=pts.map(function(p){return p.label;}); var field=cfg.field||'lh'; // Get selected date for truncating actual line and drawing marker var selectedDate = getProgressDate(); // Determine data fields based on chart type var lateKey, blKey, earlyKey, actualKey; if(field==='lh'){ lateKey='late_lh'; blKey='plan_lh'; earlyKey='early_lh'; actualKey='actual_lh'; } else if(field==='acts'){ lateKey='late_acts'; blKey='plan_acts'; earlyKey='early_acts'; actualKey='actual_acts'; } else if(field==='cp'){ lateKey='late_cp'; blKey='plan_cp'; earlyKey='early_cp'; actualKey='actual_cp'; } else if(field==='cp_acts'){ lateKey='late_cp'; blKey='plan_cp'; earlyKey='early_cp'; actualKey='actual_cp'; } else { lateKey='late_lh'; blKey='plan_lh'; earlyKey='early_lh'; actualKey='actual_lh'; } // Truncate actual data to selected date (null after selected date) var actualData = pts.map(function(p){ return p.date <= selectedDate ? (p[actualKey]||0) : null; }); // Find the index of the selected date for the vertical marker var selectedIdx = -1; for(var i=0; i'+l.l+''; }).join(''); // Add "as at" date label to legend var selD=getProgressDate(); var today=fmtDateJS(new Date()); var dateLabel=selD===today?'today':selD; legendEl.innerHTML+='as at '+dateLabel+''; } var yLabel=field==='lh'?'Cumulative manhours': field==='acts'?'Cumulative activities': field==='cp'?'Cumulative CP manhours': field==='cp_acts'?'Cumulative CP activities':'Activities'; activeScChart=new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels:labels,datasets:datasets}, options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false, plugins:{ legend:{display:false}, tooltip:{mode:'index',intersect:false, callbacks:{label:function(c){ var v=c.parsed.y; return ' '+c.dataset.label+': '+(v!=null?v.toLocaleString():'—'); }}} }, scales:{ x:{grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.05)'},ticks:{font:{size:10},maxRotation:45,autoSkip:true,maxTicksLimit:25}}, y:{beginAtZero:true,grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.05)'},ticks:{font:{size:11}}, title:{display:true,text:yLabel,font:{size:11}}} }, interaction:{mode:'index',intersect:false} } }); } // ============================================================ // FCO SCOPE MANAGEMENT // ============================================================ var activeScope = 'main'; // 'main' | 'fco' | 'combined' var fcoWO = []; var fcoChartPoints = null; var DEFAULT_FCO_URL = ''; var fcoLiveUrl = localStorage.getItem('tar_ned_fco_url') || DEFAULT_FCO_URL; var fcoRefreshTimer = null; // On load, restore FCO URL and try to connect if available window.addEventListener('load', function(){ var fcoUrlEl = document.getElementById('fco-script-url'); if(fcoUrlEl && fcoLiveUrl) fcoUrlEl.value = fcoLiveUrl; }); function setScope(scope) { activeScope = scope; // Update toggle button styles var btnMain = document.getElementById('btn-main'); var btnFco = document.getElementById('btn-fco'); var btnComb = document.getElementById('btn-combined'); if(btnMain) { btnMain.className = 'scope-btn' + (scope==='main'?' active':''); } if(btnFco) { btnFco.className = 'scope-btn' + (scope==='fco'?' fco-active':''); } if(btnComb) { btnComb.className = 'scope-btn' + (scope==='combined'?' combined-active':''); } // Show/hide FCO notice bars ['wo','resources','reshistogram','critical','scurve'].forEach(function(pid){ var el = document.getElementById('fco-notice-'+pid); if(el) el.style.display = (scope==='fco') ? 'block' : 'none'; }); // Show combined S-curve button only when FCO is connected var combBtn = document.getElementById('btn-sc-combined'); if(combBtn) combBtn.style.display = (fcoWO.length > 0) ? 'inline-block' : 'none'; // Rebuild everything with the active scope var wosToUse = getScopedWOs(); rebuildFromWOs(wosToUse); } function getScopedWOs() { if(activeScope === 'main') return mainWO.length ? mainWO : allWO; if(activeScope === 'fco') return fcoWO.length > 0 ? fcoWO : []; // Combined: merge main + FCO, tag each var combined = [].concat(allWO); fcoWO.forEach(function(wo){ var tagged = Object.assign({}, wo, {_fco: true, id: 'FCO:'+wo.id, name: '[FCO] '+wo.name}); combined.push(tagged); }); return combined; } function rebuildFromWOs(wos) { // Rebuild allCP, RES_DATA, filters from the given WO set var savedAllWO = allWO; allWO = wos; ACT_INDEX = {}; wos.forEach(function(wo){ (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ if(!a.dur_h) a.dur_h = parseDurH(a.dur, a.start); if(!a.hc) a.hc = calcHC(a.plan_lh, a.dur_h); }); ACT_INDEX[wo.id] = wo.acts||[]; }); allCP = []; wos.forEach(function(wo){ (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ if(!EXCLUDE_CP[a.id] && !isMilestone(a.id,a.name)) allCP.push({id:a.id,name:a.name,plan_lh:a.plan_lh,actual_lh:a.actual_lh||0, pct:a.pct||0,fd:a.fd,fs:a.fs,dur:a.dur,dur_h:a.dur_h||0,hc:a.hc||0, res:a.res||[],start:a.start,finish:a.finish, status:a.status||'',notes:a.notes||'', wo_id:wo.id,wo_name:wo.name,eq:a.eq||wo.eq, _fco:wo._fco||false}); }); }); buildResData(); buildFilters(); filteredWO = [].concat(allWO); filterWO(); filterRes(); filterCP(); buildCPStats(); var nc = allCP.filter(function(a){return a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=3;}).length; var ur = allCP.filter(function(a){return !a.res||!a.res.length;}).length; var scopeLabel = activeScope==='fco'?' (FCO)':activeScope==='combined'?' (Combined)':''; document.getElementById('badge-acts').textContent = allCP.length.toLocaleString()+' activities'+scopeLabel; document.getElementById('badge-wos').textContent = allWO.length.toLocaleString()+' work orders'; document.getElementById('badge-nc').textContent = nc+' near-critical'; document.getElementById('badge-ur').textContent = ur+' unresourced'; computeLiveCharts(); initProgressDates(); buildSCStats(); renderSC(activeSC); updateSCPctComplete(activeSC); renderResHistogram(); // Check FCO resource conflicts with main CP if(activeScope !== 'main') checkFCOConflicts(); } function checkFCOConflicts() { // Find FCO activities that share resources with near-critical main scope activities if(!fcoWO.length) return; var mainCP = []; allWO.forEach(function(wo){ if(wo._fco) return; (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ if(a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=3) mainCP.push(a); }); }); var conflicts = []; fcoWO.forEach(function(wo){ (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ (a.res||[]).forEach(function(r){ var clashing = mainCP.filter(function(cp){ return (cp.res||[]).indexOf(r)>=0; }); if(clashing.length) { conflicts.push({fco_act:a.id, fco_name:a.name, res:r, cp_count:clashing.length}); } }); }); }); // Show conflict warning on critical path tab var cpPanel = document.querySelector('#panel-critical'); var existingWarn = document.getElementById('fco-conflict-warn'); if(existingWarn) existingWarn.remove(); if(conflicts.length && cpPanel) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.id = 'fco-conflict-warn'; div.className = 'fco-conflict'; div.innerHTML = '⚠ '+conflicts.length+' FCO resource conflict'+(conflicts.length>1?'s':'')+' — FCO activities share resources with near-critical main scope activities. Review FCO scheduling to protect the critical path.'; cpPanel.insertBefore(div, cpPanel.children[1]); } } // ============================================================ // FCO CONNECTION // ============================================================ function connectFCO() { var url = document.getElementById('fco-script-url').value.trim(); if(!url || url.indexOf('https://script.google.com') < 0) { document.getElementById('fco-connect-status').innerHTML = '
Please enter a valid Apps Script URL.
'; return; } document.getElementById('fco-connect-status').innerHTML = '
Connecting to FCO… (may take 20-40 seconds)
'; fetchFCOData(url, function(data, err) { if(err) { document.getElementById('fco-connect-status').innerHTML = '
'+err+'
'; return; } localStorage.setItem('tar_ned_fco_url', url); fcoLiveUrl = url; loadFCOData(data); document.getElementById('fco-connect-status').innerHTML = '
FCO connected — '+(data.total_acts||0)+' activities loaded.
'; if(fcoRefreshTimer) clearInterval(fcoRefreshTimer); fcoRefreshTimer = setInterval(function(){fetchFCOData(url, function(d,e){if(!e)loadFCOData(d);});}, 5*60*1000); // Show combined button now FCO is loaded var combBtn = document.getElementById('btn-sc-combined'); if(combBtn) combBtn.style.display = 'inline-block'; }); } function fetchFCOData(url, cb) { var cbName = '_fco'+Date.now(); var script = document.createElement('script'); var done = false; var timeout = setTimeout(function(){ if(done) return; done = true; delete window[cbName]; try{document.body.removeChild(script);}catch(e){} cb(null, 'FCO timed out. Check URL and Anyone access.'); }, 60000); window[cbName] = function(data){ if(done) return; done = true; clearTimeout(timeout); delete window[cbName]; try{document.body.removeChild(script);}catch(e){} if(data.error) { cb(null, 'FCO error: '+data.error); return; } cb(data, null); }; script.onerror = function(){ if(done) return; done = true; clearTimeout(timeout); delete window[cbName]; cb(null, 'Failed to reach FCO script. Check URL and Anyone access.'); }; var sep = url.indexOf('?') >= 0 ? '&' : '?'; script.src = url + sep + 'callback=' + cbName + '&_=' + Date.now(); document.body.appendChild(script); } function loadFCOData(data) { fcoWO = data.wos || []; fcoWO.forEach(function(wo){ wo._fco = true; (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ a._fco = true; if(!a.dur_h) a.dur_h = parseDurH(a.dur, a.start); if(!a.hc) a.hc = calcHC(a.plan_lh, a.dur_h); }); }); // Build FCO chart points if(data.scurve && data.scurve.points) { fcoChartPoints = data.scurve.points; } else { fcoChartPoints = null; } // If combined scope active, rebuild if(activeScope !== 'main') setScope(activeScope); // Add FCO badge to header var badge = document.getElementById('fco-loaded-badge'); if(!badge) { badge = document.createElement('span'); badge.id = 'fco-loaded-badge'; badge.className = 'badge b-fco'; badge.style.cursor = 'pointer'; badge.onclick = function(){ setScope('fco'); }; document.querySelector('.topbar').insertBefore(badge, document.getElementById('badge-ur').nextSibling); } badge.textContent = fcoWO.length+' FCO WOs'; } function clearFCO() { localStorage.removeItem('tar_ned_fco_url'); fcoLiveUrl = ''; fcoWO = []; fcoChartPoints = null; if(fcoRefreshTimer) clearInterval(fcoRefreshTimer); document.getElementById('fco-script-url').value = ''; document.getElementById('fco-connect-status').innerHTML = '
FCO disconnected.
'; var badge = document.getElementById('fco-loaded-badge'); if(badge) badge.remove(); var combBtn = document.getElementById('btn-sc-combined'); if(combBtn) combBtn.style.display = 'none'; setScope('main'); } // ============================================================ // COMBINED S-CURVE // ============================================================ function renderCombinedSCurve(){ if(activeScChart){activeScChart.destroy();activeScChart=null;} var ctx = document.getElementById('sc-canvas').getContext('2d'); var mainPts = window.chartPoints || CHART_DATA; var labels = mainPts.map(function(p){return p.label;}); var datasets = [ // Main scope - late (red dashed) {label:'Main late finish', data:mainPts.map(function(p){return p.late_lh||0;}), borderColor:'#E24B4A',backgroundColor:'transparent', borderWidth:1.5,borderDash:[5,3],tension:.4,pointRadius:0}, // Main scope - baseline (navy) {label:'Main baseline', data:mainPts.map(function(p){return p.plan_lh||0;}), borderColor:'#1E3A5F',backgroundColor:'transparent', borderWidth:2,tension:.4,pointRadius:0}, // Main scope - early (blue dashed) {label:'Main early finish', data:mainPts.map(function(p){return p.early_lh||0;}), borderColor:'#378ADD',backgroundColor:'transparent', borderWidth:1.5,borderDash:[4,2],tension:.4,pointRadius:0}, // Main actual (green) {label:'Main actual', data:mainPts.map(function(p){return p.actual_lh||0;}), borderColor:'#1D9E75',backgroundColor:'transparent', borderWidth:2,tension:.35,pointRadius:2,pointBackgroundColor:'#1D9E75'}, ]; // FCO actual line (amber) if connected if(fcoChartPoints && fcoChartPoints.length){ var fcoMap = {}; fcoChartPoints.forEach(function(p){fcoMap[p.date]=p.actual_lh||0;}); datasets.push({ label:'FCO actual', data:mainPts.map(function(p){return fcoMap[p.date]||0;}), borderColor:'#C47B1A',backgroundColor:'transparent', borderWidth:2.5,tension:.35,pointRadius:2,pointBackgroundColor:'#C47B1A' }); // Combined total (main actual + FCO actual) datasets.push({ label:'Combined total', data:mainPts.map(function(p){return (p.actual_lh||0)+(fcoMap[p.date]||0);}), borderColor:'#1D9E75',backgroundColor:'rgba(29,158,117,.08)', borderWidth:3,tension:.35,pointRadius:0,fill:false, borderDash:[], }); } else { // No FCO yet - show placeholder document.getElementById('sc-sub').textContent = 'Connect FCO data in Setup to see FCO and Combined lines'; } var legendEl = document.getElementById('sc-legend'); if(legendEl){ var items = datasets.map(function(ds){ return ''+ds.label+''; }); legendEl.innerHTML = items.join(''); } activeScChart = new Chart(ctx, {type:'line', data:{labels:labels, datasets:datasets}, options:{responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, plugins:{legend:{display:false}, tooltip:{mode:'index',intersect:false, callbacks:{label:function(c){return ' '+c.dataset.label+': '+(c.parsed.y!=null?c.parsed.y.toLocaleString():'—')+'h';}}}}, scales:{ x:{grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.05)'},ticks:{font:{size:10},maxRotation:45,autoSkip:true,maxTicksLimit:25}}, y:{beginAtZero:true,grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.05)'},ticks:{font:{size:11}}, title:{display:true,text:'Cumulative manhours',font:{size:11}}} }, interaction:{mode:'index',intersect:false} } }); } // ============================================================ // PROGRESS DATE MANAGEMENT // ============================================================ function getProgressDate() { var el = document.getElementById('progress-date'); return el && el.value ? el.value : fmtDateJS(new Date()); } function getBehindDate() { var el = document.getElementById('behind-date'); return el && el.value ? el.value : fmtDateJS(new Date()); } function setProgressDateToday() { var today = fmtDateJS(new Date()); var el = document.getElementById('progress-date'); if(el) el.value = today; onProgressDateChange(); } function setBehindDateToday() { var today = fmtDateJS(new Date()); var el = document.getElementById('behind-date'); if(el) el.value = today; filterBehind(); } function onProgressDateChange() { // Update label var el = document.getElementById('progress-date'); var lbl = document.getElementById('progress-date-label'); if(lbl && el) { var today = fmtDateJS(new Date()); if(el.value === today) lbl.textContent = '(today)'; else if(el.value < today) lbl.textContent = '('+Math.round((new Date(today)-new Date(el.value))/86400000)+'d ago)'; else lbl.textContent = '(+'+Math.round((new Date(el.value)-new Date(today))/86400000)+'d)'; } // Re-render everything that is date-aware if(document.getElementById('panel-scurve').classList.contains('active')) { buildSCStats(); renderSC(activeSC); } updateSCPctComplete(activeSC); // Update behind schedule if that tab is active if(document.getElementById('panel-behind') && document.getElementById('panel-behind').classList.contains('active')) { filterBehind(); } } function initProgressDates() { var today = fmtDateJS(new Date()); var pdEl = document.getElementById('progress-date'); var bdEl = document.getElementById('behind-date'); if(pdEl && !pdEl.value) pdEl.value = today; if(bdEl && !bdEl.value) bdEl.value = today; var lbl = document.getElementById('progress-date-label'); if(lbl) lbl.textContent = '(today)'; } // ============================================================ // % COMPLETE ON S-CURVES // ============================================================ function updateSCPctComplete(key) { var pctRow = document.getElementById('sc-pct-row'); var planEl = document.getElementById('sc-pct-plan'); var actualEl = document.getElementById('sc-pct-actual'); var varEl = document.getElementById('sc-pct-variance'); var planLbl = document.getElementById('sc-pct-plan-label'); var actLbl = document.getElementById('sc-pct-actual-label'); // Hide for non-applicable charts if(key === 'float') { if(pctRow) pctRow.style.display='none'; return; } if(pctRow) pctRow.style.display='flex'; // Use filtered points if equipment filter is active var scEq = document.getElementById('sc-eq-filter'); var eqFilter = scEq ? scEq.value : ''; var pts; if(eqFilter && typeof computeFilteredSC === 'function') { pts = computeFilteredSC(eqFilter); } else { pts = window.chartPoints || CHART_DATA; } if(!pts || !pts.length) return; // Get selected progress date var today = getProgressDate(); // Find last point on or before selected date var todayPt = null; for(var i = pts.length-1; i >= 0; i--) { if(pts[i].date <= today) { todayPt = pts[i]; break; } } var lastPt = pts[pts.length-1]; var planPct = 0, actualPct = 0, total = 0, planToday = 0; if(key === 'lh' || key === 'combined_lh') { total = lastPt.plan_lh || 0; planToday = todayPt ? (todayPt.plan_lh || 0) : 0; var actualNow = todayPt ? (todayPt.actual_lh || 0) : 0; planPct = total > 0 ? Math.round(planToday / total * 100) : 0; actualPct = total > 0 ? Math.round(actualNow / total * 100) : 0; if(planLbl) planLbl.textContent = 'Plan % (manhours)'; if(actLbl) actLbl.textContent = 'Actual % (manhours)'; } else if(key === 'acts') { total = lastPt.plan_acts || 0; planToday = todayPt ? (todayPt.plan_acts || 0) : 0; var actualNow = todayPt ? (todayPt.actual_acts || 0) : 0; planPct = total > 0 ? Math.round(planToday / total * 100) : 0; actualPct = total > 0 ? Math.round(actualNow / total * 100) : 0; if(planLbl) planLbl.textContent = 'Plan % (activities)'; if(actLbl) actLbl.textContent = 'Actual % (activities)'; } else if(key === 'cp') { total = lastPt.plan_cp || 0; planToday = todayPt ? (todayPt.plan_cp || 0) : 0; var actualNow = todayPt ? (todayPt.actual_cp || 0) : 0; planPct = total > 0 ? Math.round(planToday / total * 100) : 0; actualPct = total > 0 ? Math.round(actualNow / total * 100) : 0; if(planLbl) planLbl.textContent = 'Plan % (CP manhours)'; if(actLbl) actLbl.textContent = 'Actual % (CP manhours)'; } else if(key === 'cp_acts') { total = lastPt.plan_cp || 0; planToday = todayPt ? (todayPt.plan_cp || 0) : 0; var actualNow = todayPt ? (todayPt.actual_cp || 0) : 0; planPct = total > 0 ? Math.round(planToday / total * 100) : 0; actualPct = total > 0 ? Math.round(actualNow / total * 100) : 0; if(planLbl) planLbl.textContent = 'Plan % (CP activities)'; if(actLbl) actLbl.textContent = 'Actual % (CP activities)'; } else if(key === 'hist') { total = lastPt.plan_acts || 0; planToday = todayPt ? (todayPt.plan_acts || 0) : 0; var actualNow = todayPt ? (todayPt.actual_acts || 0) : 0; planPct = total > 0 ? Math.round(planToday / total * 100) : 0; actualPct = total > 0 ? Math.round(actualNow / total * 100) : 0; if(planLbl) planLbl.textContent = 'Plan % (activities)'; if(actLbl) actLbl.textContent = 'Actual % (activities)'; } if(planEl) { planEl.textContent = planPct + '%'; } if(actualEl) { actualEl.textContent = actualPct + '%'; actualEl.className = 'pct-number ' + (actualPct >= planPct ? 'actual' : 'behind'); } var variance = actualPct - planPct; if(varEl) { varEl.textContent = (variance >= 0 ? '+' : '') + variance + '%'; varEl.className = 'pct-variance ' + (variance > 0 ? 'ahead' : variance < 0 ? 'behind' : 'on'); } } // ============================================================ // BEHIND SCHEDULE TAB // ============================================================ var filteredBehind = []; var behindPage = 0; var BWPS = 50; function buildBehindData() { var today = getBehindDate(); var behind = []; allWO.forEach(function(wo) { (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a) { if(isMilestone(a.id, a.name)) return; if(a.status === 'Complete' || a.pct >= 100) return; // Planned finish = baseline finish or BL finish var plannedFinish = a.bl_finish || (a.finish ? a.finish.slice(0,10) : ''); // Expected/current finish var expectedFinish = a.finish ? a.finish.slice(0,10) : ''; if(!plannedFinish || !expectedFinish) return; // Only include if expected finish is AFTER today AND after planned finish // (i.e. not yet complete and running late) var isLate = expectedFinish > plannedFinish && plannedFinish <= today; // Also include activities that SHOULD have started by today but haven't var shouldHaveStarted = plannedFinish <= today && !a.status && (!a.start || a.start.slice(0,10) > today); if(!isLate && !shouldHaveStarted) return; try { var pf = new Date(plannedFinish + 'T00:00:00'); var ef = new Date(expectedFinish + 'T00:00:00'); var slipDays = Math.round((ef - pf) / 86400000); if(slipDays <= 0 && !shouldHaveStarted) return; behind.push({ id: a.id, name: a.name, wo_id: wo.id, wo_name: wo.name, eq: a.eq || wo.eq, res: a.res || [], planned_finish: plannedFinish, expected_finish: expectedFinish, slip_days: shouldHaveStarted ? Math.round((new Date(today) - pf) / 86400000) : slipDays, plan_lh: a.plan_lh || 0, pct: a.pct || 0, fd: a.fd, fs: a.fs, not_started: shouldHaveStarted }); } catch(e) {} }); }); // Sort by slip_days desc by default behind.sort(function(a,b){ return b.slip_days - a.slip_days; }); return behind; } function initBehindFilters(data) { // Populate resource and equipment dropdowns var resSet = {}, eqSet = {}; data.forEach(function(a){ (a.res||[]).forEach(function(r){ resSet[r]=true; }); if(a.eq) eqSet[a.eq]=true; }); var resEl = document.getElementById('behind-res'); var eqEl = document.getElementById('behind-eq'); while(resEl && resEl.options.length > 1) resEl.remove(1); while(eqEl && eqEl.options.length > 1) eqEl.remove(1); Object.keys(resSet).sort().forEach(function(r){ if(resEl) resEl.add(new Option(r,r)); }); Object.keys(eqSet).sort().forEach(function(e){ if(eqEl) eqEl.add(new Option(e,e)); }); } function filterBehind() { behindPage = 0; var q = document.getElementById('behind-search').value.toLowerCase(); var res = document.getElementById('behind-res').value; var eq = document.getElementById('behind-eq').value; var sort = document.getElementById('behind-sort').value; var all = buildBehindData(); if(q) all = all.filter(function(a){ return a.id.toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0||a.name.toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0||a.wo_id.toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0; }); if(res) all = all.filter(function(a){ return (a.res||[]).indexOf(res)>=0; }); if(eq) all = all.filter(function(a){ return a.eq===eq; }); var sf = sort.split('_')[0], dir = sort.split('_')[1]==='desc' ? -1 : 1; all.sort(function(a,b){ var va = sf==='slip'?a.slip_days:sf==='lh'?a.plan_lh:(a.fd==null?999:a.fd); var vb = sf==='slip'?b.slip_days:sf==='lh'?b.plan_lh:(b.fd==null?999:b.fd); return dir*(vb-va); }); filteredBehind = all; renderBehindStats(all); renderBehindTable(); } function renderBehindStats(data) { var totalSlip = data.reduce(function(s,a){ return s+a.slip_days; }, 0); var cpBehind = data.filter(function(a){ return a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=3; }).length; var notStarted = data.filter(function(a){ return a.not_started; }).length; var maxSlip = data.length ? Math.max.apply(null, data.map(function(a){return a.slip_days;})) : 0; var asAtDate = getBehindDate(); var today = fmtDateJS(new Date()); var dateLabel = asAtDate === today ? 'today' : asAtDate; document.getElementById('behind-stats').innerHTML = '
Behind as at '+dateLabel+'
'+data.length.toLocaleString()+'
'+ '
Not yet started
'+notStarted+'
'+ '
CP activities behind
'+cpBehind+'
'+ '
Worst slip
'+maxSlip+'d
'+ '
Total slip days
'+totalSlip.toLocaleString()+'d
'; } function renderBehindTable() { var tbody = document.getElementById('behind-tbody'); var page = filteredBehind.slice(behindPage*BWPS, (behindPage+1)*BWPS); if(!page.length) { tbody.innerHTML = ''+ (filteredBehind.length === 0 && buildBehindData().length === 0 ? '✓ No activities are currently behind schedule.' : 'No activities match the current filters.')+ ''; renderBehindPager(); return; } tbody.innerHTML = page.map(function(a) { var fd_col = a.fd != null ? ''+a.fd.toFixed(1)+'d' : '—'; var risk = a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=3 ? 'CP risk' : a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=10 ? 'Low float' : a.not_started ? 'Not started' : 'Monitor'; var slip_cls = a.slip_days > 14 ? 'danger' : a.slip_days > 7 ? 'warning' : ''; var res_chips = (a.res||[]).map(function(r){ return ''+r+''; }).join(''); return ''+ ''+a.id+''+ ''+a.name+''+ ''+a.wo_id+''+ ''+a.eq+''+ ''+res_chips+''+ ''+fmtD(a.planned_finish)+''+ ''+fmtD(a.expected_finish)+''+ '+'+a.slip_days+'d'+ ''+a.plan_lh.toLocaleString()+'h'+ ''+a.pct.toFixed(0)+'%'+ (a.plan_lh>0?'
':'')+''+ ''+fd_col+''+ ''+risk+''+ ''; }).join(''); renderBehindPager(); } function renderBehindPager() { var total = filteredBehind.length; var pages = Math.ceil(total/BWPS); var pg = document.getElementById('behind-pager'); if(pages <= 1) { pg.innerHTML = ''+total+' activit'+(total!==1?'ies':'y')+' behind schedule'; return; } pg.innerHTML = ''+ 'Page '+(behindPage+1)+' of '+pages+' ('+total+')'+ ''; } function behindGo(p) { behindPage=p; renderBehindTable(); } // Compute S-curve points filtered to a specific equipment type function computeFilteredSC(eqFilter){ if(!eqFilter) return window.chartPoints||CHART_DATA; // Collect acts for this equipment type only var acts=[]; allWO.forEach(function(wo){ if(wo.eq!==eqFilter) return; (wo.acts||[]).forEach(function(a){ acts.push(a); }); }); if(!acts.length) return window.chartPoints||CHART_DATA; // Build date range - must include BL start/finish AND actual start/finish var overallStart=null, overallEnd=null; acts.forEach(function(a){ // Include BL start for range var blS=a.bl_start?a.bl_start.slice(0,10):''; var blF=a.bl_finish?a.bl_finish.slice(0,10):''; var actS=a.start?a.start.slice(0,10):''; var actF=a.finish?a.finish.slice(0,10):''; var latF=a.late_finish?a.late_finish.slice(0,10):''; [blS,actS].forEach(function(s){if(s&&(!overallStart||soverallEnd))overallEnd=f;}); }); if(!overallStart){ var base=window.chartPoints||CHART_DATA; return base; } // Always start from the overall project start so curves begin at 0 var projectStart = (window.liveMeta||CHART_META).overall_start || overallStart; var projectEnd = (window.liveMeta||CHART_META).overall_end || overallEnd; // Use project start if earlier than equipment start (so x-axis is consistent) var rangeStart = projectStart < overallStart ? projectStart : overallStart; var rangeEnd = projectEnd > overallEnd ? projectEnd : overallEnd; var allDays=buildDayList(rangeStart, rangeEnd); var lhBL={},lhE={},lhL={},lhA={}; var aBL={},aE={},aL={},aA={}; var cpBL={},cpE={},cpL={},cpA={}; var hist={},histA={}; allDays.forEach(function(dk){ lhBL[dk]=0;lhE[dk]=0;lhL[dk]=0;lhA[dk]=0; aBL[dk]=0;aE[dk]=0;aL[dk]=0;aA[dk]=0; cpBL[dk]=0;cpE[dk]=0;cpL[dk]=0;cpA[dk]=0; hist[dk]=0;histA[dk]=0; }); acts.forEach(function(a){ if(isMilestone(a.id,a.name)) return; var lh=a.plan_lh||0; var alh=a.actual_lh||0; var sd=a.start?a.start.slice(0,10):''; var fd=a.finish?a.finish.slice(0,10):''; var blFd=a.bl_finish?a.bl_finish.slice(0,10):fd; var lateFd=a.late_finish?a.late_finish.slice(0,10):blFd; var isComp=(a.pct>=100||a.status==='Complete'); var actFd=isComp&&a.finish?a.finish.slice(0,10):null; var isCP=a.fd!=null&&a.fd<=3; // Distribute LH across date range function distLH(byDay,s,f,v){ if(!s||!f||!v) return; try{ var sd2=new Date(s+'T00:00:00'),fd2=new Date(f+'T00:00:00'); var days=[]; var d=new Date(sd2); while(d<=fd2){var k=fmtDateJS(d);if(byDay.hasOwnProperty(k))days.push(k);d.setDate(d.getDate()+1);} if(days.length){var lhd=v/days.length;days.forEach(function(k){byDay[k]+=lhd;});} }catch(e){} } // Baseline MUST use BL start → BL finish (not actual start which may be after BL finish) var blSd=a.bl_start?a.bl_start.slice(0,10):''; // Clamp early/late finish to start if inverted var eFd2=fd||blFd; if(eFd2&&sd&&eFd2=0; i--){ if(pts[i].date <= selectedDate){ todayPt=pts[i]; break; } } var actualLH = todayPt ? (todayPt.actual_lh || 0) : 0; var actualActs = todayPt ? (todayPt.actual_acts || 0) : 0; var planToDate = todayPt ? (todayPt.plan_lh || 0) : 0; var planActsToDate = todayPt ? (todayPt.plan_acts || 0) : 0; document.getElementById('sc-stats').innerHTML= '
Total plan hrs'+(eqFilter?' ('+eqFilter+')':'')+'
'+Math.round(totalPlanLH).toLocaleString()+'
'+ '
Actual hrs (as at '+selectedDate+')
'+Math.round(actualLH).toLocaleString()+'
'+ '
Plan acts (as at '+selectedDate+')
'+Math.round(planActsToDate).toLocaleString()+'
'+ '
Critical path acts
'+meta.total_cp_acts+'
'+ '
Actual complete (as at '+selectedDate+')
'+Math.round(actualActs).toLocaleString()+'
'; } function selectSC(key,btn){ activeSC=key; document.querySelectorAll('.sc-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active');}); btn.classList.add('active'); renderSC(key); updateSCPctComplete(key); } function renderSC(key){ var cfg=SC_CFG[key]; var scEq=document.getElementById('sc-eq-filter'); var eqFilter=scEq?scEq.value:''; // If equipment filter active, recompute filtered points var pts; if(eqFilter){ pts=computeFilteredSC(eqFilter); } else { pts=window.chartPoints||CHART_DATA; } document.getElementById('sc-title').textContent=cfg.title; document.getElementById('sc-sub').textContent=cfg.sub; document.getElementById('sc-legend').innerHTML=cfg.legend.map(function(l){ return''+l.l+''; }).join(''); if(activeScChart){activeScChart.destroy();activeScChart=null;} var ctx=document.getElementById('sc-canvas').getContext('2d'); var labels=pts.map(function(p){return p.label;}); // Handle combined main+FCO chart if(cfg.combined){ renderCombinedSCurve(); return; } // Handle three-curve (early/baseline/late/actual) chart if(cfg.three_curve){ renderThreeCurve(cfg, pts, eqFilter); return; } if(cfg.mixed){ var selectedDate2=getProgressDate(); var planHist=pts.map(function(p){return p.hist||0;}); var actHist=pts.map(function(p){return p.actual_hist||0;}); // Grey out plan bars after selected date var planColors=pts.map(function(p){return p.date<=selectedDate2?'rgba(55,138,221,.6)':'rgba(200,200,200,.3)';}); var actColors=pts.map(function(p){return p.date<=selectedDate2?'rgba(29,158,117,.8)':'rgba(200,200,200,.3)';}); var rolling=pts.map(function(_,i){ var slice=planHist.slice(Math.max(0,i-2),i+3); return Math.round(slice.reduce(function(s,v){return s+v;},0)/slice.length); }); activeScChart=new Chart(ctx,{data:{labels:labels,datasets:[ {type:'bar',label:'Planned',data:planHist,backgroundColor:'rgba(55,138,221,.5)',borderColor:'#378ADD',borderWidth:1,borderRadius:2}, {type:'bar',label:'Actual',data:actHist,backgroundColor:'rgba(29,158,117,.8)',borderColor:'#1D9E75',borderWidth:1,borderRadius:2}, {type:'line',label:'5-day avg (plan)',data:rolling,borderColor:'#185FA5',backgroundColor:'transparent',borderWidth:2,tension:.4,pointRadius:0} ]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false, plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{mode:'index',intersect:false}}, scales:{x:{grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.05)'},ticks:{font:{size:11},maxRotation:45,autoSkip:true,maxTicksLimit:30}}, y:{beginAtZero:true,grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.05)'},ticks:{font:{size:11}},title:{display:true,text:'Activities per day',font:{size:11}}}}}}); return; } var scaleY={beginAtZero:true,grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.05)'},ticks:{font:{size:11}}}; if(cfg.yLabel)scaleY.title={display:true,text:cfg.yLabel,font:{size:11}}; if(cfg.yMin!=null)scaleY.min=cfg.yMin; activeScChart=new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels:labels,datasets:cfg.ds(pts)}, options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false, plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{mode:'index',intersect:false, callbacks:{label:function(c){return' '+c.dataset.label+': '+(c.parsed.y!=null?c.parsed.y.toLocaleString():'—');}}}}, scales:{x:{grid:{color:'rgba(0,0,0,.05)'},ticks:{font:{size:11}}},y:scaleY}, interaction:{mode:'index',intersect:false}}}); } // ---- Setup ---- function connectLiveQuick(){ // Connect using the stored/default URL without going to Setup tab var url = liveUrl || DEFAULT_SCRIPT_URL || ''; if(!url){ switchTab('setup', document.querySelector('[data-tab=setup]')); return; } var scriptInput = document.getElementById('script-url'); if(scriptInput) scriptInput.value = url; fetchLive(url); } function connectLive(){ var url=document.getElementById('script-url').value.trim(); if(!url||url.indexOf('https://script.google.com')<0){ document.getElementById('connect-status').innerHTML='
Please enter a valid Apps Script URL.
';return; } document.getElementById('connect-status').innerHTML='
Connecting… this may take 20-40 seconds for large datasets. Please wait.
'; localStorage.setItem('tar_ned_url',url); liveUrl=url; var cbName='_tarConnect'+Date.now(); var script=document.createElement('script'); var done=false; var timeout=setTimeout(function(){ if(done)return;done=true;delete window[cbName];try{document.body.removeChild(script);}catch(e){} document.getElementById('connect-status').innerHTML='
Timed out after 60 seconds. Check URL and Anyone access.
'; },60000); window[cbName]=function(data){ if(done)return;done=true;clearTimeout(timeout);delete window[cbName];try{document.body.removeChild(script);}catch(e){} if(data.error){document.getElementById('connect-status').innerHTML='
Sheet error: '+data.error+'
';return;} loadData(data);setStatus('live','Live — updated '+new Date().toLocaleTimeString()); document.getElementById('connect-status').innerHTML='
Connected — '+(data.total_acts||0).toLocaleString()+' activities loaded. Auto-refreshes every 5 minutes.
'; if(refreshTimer)clearInterval(refreshTimer); refreshTimer=setInterval(function(){fetchLive(liveUrl);},5*60*1000); }; script.onerror=function(){ if(done)return;done=true;clearTimeout(timeout);delete window[cbName]; document.getElementById('connect-status').innerHTML='
Failed to load. Check URL and Anyone access.
'; }; var sep=url.indexOf('?')>=0?'&':'?'; script.src=url+sep+'callback='+cbName+'&_='+Date.now(); document.body.appendChild(script); } function clearLive(){ localStorage.removeItem('tar_ned_url');liveUrl=''; if(refreshTimer)clearInterval(refreshTimer); document.getElementById('script-url').value=''; document.getElementById('connect-status').innerHTML='
Disconnected.
'; setStatus('offline','Nederland ASU — P6 baseline (30 Mar 2026) · Live connect disabled'); loadData(offlinePayload()); } function switchTab(name,btn){ document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(function(t){t.classList.remove('active');}); document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove('active');}); document.getElementById('panel-'+name).classList.add('active'); if(name==='gantt') setTimeout(initGantt, 50); if(btn)btn.classList.add('active'); if(name==='reshistogram'&&!activeHistChart)renderResHistogram(); if(name==='scurve'){initProgressDates(); if(!activeScChart)renderSC(activeSC); updateSCPctComplete(activeSC);} if(name==='behind'){initProgressDates(); var allBehind=buildBehindData(); initBehindFilters(allBehind); filterBehind(); } } // ══ GANTT ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
