1","color":"#2196F3","wos":["W-14058961","W-14058936","W-14708972","W-14708973","W-13996604","W-14291918","W-14397734","W-14549113","W-13456768","W-14133273","W-12954705","W-14540315"]}, {"name":"DCA","color":"#FF9800","wos":["W-14154082","W-14877360","W-14058947"]}, {"name":"MAC A","color":"#4CAF50","wos":["W-14232926","W-14553220","W-13278670","W-13988210","W-14024062","W-13117496","W-13988159","W-14875626"]}, {"name":"N96A Motor","color":"#9C27B0","wos":["W-14553243","W-14089167","W-14008081","W-14553244"]}, {"name":"KV301/302 & TV250","color":"#F44336","wos":["W-14058922","W-14058925","W-14561747","W-14058923"]} ]; var ganttWOLookup = {}; GANTT_WO_DATA.forEach(function(w){ganttWOLookup[w.id]=w;}); var ganttActivePhase = ''; // '' = all phases var ganttClickedWO = null; // All phases from WO data var GANTT_PHASES = (function(){ var seen = {}; GANTT_WO_DATA.forEach(function(w){if(w.phase)seen[w.phase]=true;}); return Object.keys(seen).sort(); })(); function ganttFilteredWOs(group){ return group.wos.filter(function(wid){ var wo = ganttWOLookup[wid]; if(!wo) return false; if(ganttActivePhase && wo.phase !== ganttActivePhase) return false; return true; }); } function ganttAddGroup(){ var name = prompt('Group name:'); if(!name) return; var colors = ['#00BCD4','#795548','#607D8B','#E91E63','#009688','#FF5722','#3F51B5']; var color = colors[ganttGroups.length % colors.length]; ganttGroups.push({name:name, color:color, wos:[]}); renderGanttEditor(); renderGantt(); } function ganttRemoveGroup(idx){ if(!confirm('Remove group "'+ganttGroups[idx].name+'"?')) return; ganttGroups.splice(idx,1); renderGanttEditor(); renderGantt(); } function ganttRenameGroup(idx){ var name = prompt('Rename group:', ganttGroups[idx].name); if(name){ganttGroups[idx].name=name; renderGanttEditor(); renderGantt();} } function ganttChangeColor(idx,val){ ganttGroups[idx].color=val; renderGanttEditor(); renderGantt(); } function ganttAddWO(idx){ var inp = document.getElementById('gantt-wo-input-'+idx); var woId = inp ? inp.value.trim() : ''; if(!woId) return; var found = null; if(ganttWOLookup[woId]){found=woId;} else{ var upper = woId.toUpperCase(); var match = GANTT_WO_DATA.find(function(w){ return w.id.toUpperCase().indexOf(upper)>=0 || w.name.toUpperCase().indexOf(upper)>=0; }); if(match) found=match.id; } if(!found){alert('WO not found: '+woId); return;} if(ganttGroups[idx].wos.indexOf(found)<0) ganttGroups[idx].wos.push(found); if(inp) inp.value=''; renderGanttEditor(); renderGantt(); } function ganttRemoveWO(gIdx,woId){ ganttGroups[gIdx].wos=ganttGroups[gIdx].wos.filter(function(w){return w!==woId;}); renderGanttEditor(); renderGantt(); } function ganttRRect(ctx,x,y,w,h,r){ if(w<1) w=1; if(h<2*r) r=h/2; if(w<2*r) r=w/2; ctx.moveTo(x+r,y); ctx.lineTo(x+w-r,y); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y,x+w,y+r); ctx.lineTo(x+w,y+h-r); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y+h,x+w-r,y+h); ctx.lineTo(x+r,y+h); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y+h,x,y+h-r); ctx.lineTo(x,y+r); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y,x+r,y); ctx.closePath(); } function renderGanttEditor(){ var el = document.getElementById('gantt-group-editor'); if(!el) return; el.innerHTML = ganttGroups.map(function(g,gi){ var filteredWOs = ganttFilteredWOs(g); var woTags = g.wos.map(function(wid){ var wo = ganttWOLookup[wid]; var label = wo ? wid+' – '+wo.name.substring(wid.length+2,wid.length+42) : wid; var phaseMatch = !ganttActivePhase || (wo && wo.phase===ganttActivePhase); return '' +label.substring(0,40)+(label.length>40?'…':'') +''; }).join(''); return '
' +'
' +'' +''+g.name+'' +'('+filteredWOs.length+'/'+g.wos.length+' WOs'+(ganttActivePhase?' in phase':'')+' )' +'' +'
' +'
'+woTags+'
' +'
' +'' +'' +'
' +'
'; }).join('') +''+GANTT_WO_DATA.map(function(w){return '';}).join('')+''; } function renderGanttPhaseToggle(){ var el = document.getElementById('gantt-phase-toggle'); if(!el) return; var btns = ['']; GANTT_PHASES.forEach(function(ph){ btns.push(''); }); el.innerHTML = btns.join(''); } function ganttSetPhase(ph,btn){ ganttActivePhase = ph; ganttClickedWO = null; document.getElementById('gantt-detail-panel').style.display='none'; renderGanttPhaseToggle(); renderGanttEditor(); renderGantt(); } // ── Main render ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function renderGantt(){ var cv = document.getElementById('gantt-canvas'); var wrap = document.getElementById('gantt-chart-wrap'); if(!cv||!wrap) return; var showWOs = document.getElementById('gantt-show-wos') && document.getElementById('gantt-show-wos').checked; var dpr = window.devicePixelRatio||1; var cssW = wrap.clientWidth||900; var TAR_S = '2026-02-02', TAR_E = '2026-05-01'; var startD = new Date(TAR_S+'T00:00:00'); var endD = new Date(TAR_E+'T00:00:00'); var totalDays = (endD-startD)/(864e5); var GROUP_H=38, WO_H=24, HEADER_H=44, LABEL_W=230; var BAR_W = Math.max(400, cssW-LABEL_W-16); // Build rows var rows=[], rowMeta=[]; ganttGroups.forEach(function(g,gi){ var filteredWOs = ganttFilteredWOs(g); rows.push({type:'group',g:g,gi:gi,wos:filteredWOs}); rowMeta.push(null); if(showWOs){ filteredWOs.forEach(function(wid){ var wo=ganttWOLookup[wid]; if(wo){ rows.push({type:'wo',wo:wo,g:g,gi:gi}); rowMeta.push(wo); } }); } }); var totalH = HEADER_H + rows.reduce(function(s,r){return s+(r.type==='group'?GROUP_H:WO_H);},0)+20; cv.style.height=totalH+'px'; cv.width=Math.round(cssW*dpr); cv.height=Math.round(totalH*dpr); var ctx=cv.getContext('2d'); ctx.setTransform(dpr,0,0,dpr,0,0); ctx.clearRect(0,0,cssW,totalH); ctx.fillStyle='#fff'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,cssW,totalH); function dateX(ds){ if(!ds) return LABEL_W; var d=new Date(ds.substring(0,10)+'T00:00:00'); var diff=(d-startD)/864e5; return LABEL_W+(diff/totalDays)*BAR_W; } // Header ctx.fillStyle='#f5f3ef'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,cssW,HEADER_H); ctx.strokeStyle='#e0ddd8'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,HEADER_H); ctx.lineTo(cssW,HEADER_H); ctx.stroke(); var months=['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec']; var dm=new Date(startD); dm.setDate(1); while(dm<=endD){ var mx=dateX(dm.toISOString().substring(0,10)); if(mx>=LABEL_W){ ctx.strokeStyle='#e0ddd8'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(mx,0); ctx.lineTo(mx,totalH); ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle='#666'; ctx.font='11px -apple-system,sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign='left'; ctx.fillText(months[dm.getMonth()]+' '+dm.getFullYear().toString().slice(2), mx+3,16); } // Week ticks var wd=new Date(dm); while(wd=LABEL_W){ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,0,0,.04)'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(wx,HEADER_H); ctx.lineTo(wx,totalH); ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle='#bbb'; ctx.font='9px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillText(wd.getDate(),wx,30); } wd.setDate(wd.getDate()+7); } dm.setMonth(dm.getMonth()+1); } // Today line var todayStr=(typeof getProgressDate==='function')?getProgressDate():new Date().toISOString().substring(0,10); var tx=dateX(todayStr); if(tx>=LABEL_W&&tx<=cssW){ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(229,57,53,.75)'; ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.setLineDash([4,3]); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(tx,HEADER_H); ctx.lineTo(tx,totalH); ctx.stroke(); ctx.setLineDash([]); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(229,57,53,.85)'; ctx.font='bold 10px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillText('today',tx,HEADER_H-5); } // Store row Y positions for click detection cv._rows=[]; cv._rowY=[]; var y=HEADER_H; rows.forEach(function(row,ri){ var rh=row.type==='group'?GROUP_H:WO_H; cv._rows.push(row); cv._rowY.push({y:y,h:rh}); // Row bg var isSelected = ganttClickedWO && row.type==='wo' && row.wo.id===ganttClickedWO; ctx.fillStyle = isSelected?'#EEF6FF': (ri%2===0?'#fafafa':'#fff'); ctx.fillRect(LABEL_W,y,BAR_W,rh); if(row.type==='group'){ ctx.fillStyle='#edf2f7'; ctx.fillRect(0,y,cssW,rh); // Group aggregate: min actual_start → max bl_finish across filtered WOs var filteredWOs=row.wos; var woDates=filteredWOs.map(function(wid){return ganttWOLookup[wid];}).filter(Boolean); var minBLS=null,maxBLF=null,minActS=null; var totalPlan=0,totalActual=0; woDates.forEach(function(wo){ if(wo.bl_start&&(!minBLS||wo.bl_startmaxBLF)) maxBLF=wo.bl_finish; if(wo.actual_start&&(!minActS||wo.actual_start0){ var pct=Math.min(1,totalActual/totalPlan); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,.2)'; ctx.beginPath(); ganttRRect(ctx,ax1,barY,Math.max(2,barW*pct),barH,3); ctx.fill(); } // Label on bar if(barW>80){ ctx.fillStyle='#fff'; ctx.font='bold 11px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign='left'; var pctStr=totalPlan>0?' ('+(Math.round(totalActual/totalPlan*100))+'%)':''; ctx.fillText(row.g.name+pctStr, ax1+6, barY+barH/2+4); } } // Group label ctx.fillStyle='#1E3A5F'; ctx.font='bold 12px -apple-system,sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign='left'; ctx.fillText(row.g.name+' — '+filteredWOs.length+' WOs | '+Math.round(totalPlan)+'h plan / '+Math.round(totalActual)+'h actual', 8, y+rh/2+4); } else { var wo=row.wo; var acts=GANTT_ACT_DATA[wo.id]||[]; // Compute actual hours from act data var woActualLH=acts.reduce(function(s,a){return s+(a[7]||0);},0); var woPlanLH=wo.plan_lh||0; var pct=woPlanLH>0?Math.min(1,woActualLH/woPlanLH):0; // Determine the latest finishing act (the one pushing the WO out) var latestActBLF=null,latestActName=''; acts.forEach(function(a){ var bf=a[3]; // bl_finish if(bf&&(!latestActBLF||bf>latestActBLF)){latestActBLF=bf;latestActName=a[1];} }); // Label ctx.fillStyle=isSelected?'#1E3A5F':'#444'; ctx.font=(isSelected?'bold ':'')+'11px -apple-system,sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign='left'; var label=wo.id+' '+wo.name.substring(wo.id.length+2,wo.id.length+36); ctx.fillText(label.substring(0,40)+(label.length>40?'…':''),12,y+rh/2+4); var blS=wo.bl_start||wo.start; var blF=wo.bl_finish||wo.finish; var actS=wo.actual_start||blS; // BL bar (ghost) if(blS&&blF){ var bx1=Math.max(LABEL_W,dateX(blS)),bx2=Math.min(cssW,dateX(blF)); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(180,180,180,.3)'; ctx.fillRect(bx1,y+3,Math.max(2,bx2-bx1),rh-6); } // Actual bar: actual_start → bl_finish if(actS&&blF){ var ax1=Math.max(LABEL_W,dateX(actS)),ax2=Math.min(cssW,dateX(blF)); var isLate=actS>blS; var barColor=isLate?'rgba(229,57,53,.8)':row.g.color+'cc'; ctx.fillStyle=barColor; ctx.beginPath(); ganttRRect(ctx,ax1,y+4,Math.max(2,ax2-ax1),rh-8,2); ctx.fill(); // Progress fill if(pct>0){ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,.25)'; ctx.beginPath(); ganttRRect(ctx,ax1,y+4,Math.max(2,(ax2-ax1)*pct),rh-8,2); ctx.fill(); } // Actual LH label on bar var barW2=ax2-ax1; if(barW2>50){ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.9)'; ctx.font='9px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign='left'; ctx.fillText(Math.round(woActualLH)+'/'+ Math.round(woPlanLH)+'h',ax1+3,y+rh/2+3); } } } // Row separator ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,0,0,.05)'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,y+rh); ctx.lineTo(cssW,y+rh); ctx.stroke(); ctx.strokeStyle='#e0ddd8'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(LABEL_W,y); ctx.lineTo(LABEL_W,y+rh); ctx.stroke(); y+=rh; }); // Click handler — show drill-down panel cv.onclick=function(e){ var rect=cv.getBoundingClientRect(); var my=e.clientY-rect.top; for(var i=0;i=ry.y&&my=ry.y&&mym))?a[3]:m;},null); content=''+wo.id+'
'+wo.name.substring(wo.id.length+2).substring(0,50) +'
Phase: '+wo.phase +'
BL: '+wo.bl_start+' → '+wo.bl_finish +'
Actual start: '+(wo.actual_start||'—') +'
Plan: '+wo.plan_lh+'h | Actual: '+Math.round(actLH)+'h' +'
Click to see activities'; } else { var g=row.g; var filteredWOs=ganttFilteredWOs(g); var total=filteredWOs.reduce(function(s,wid){var w=ganttWOLookup[wid];return s+(w?w.plan_lh:0);},0); content=''+g.name+'
'+filteredWOs.length+' WOs | '+Math.round(total)+'h plan'; } tip.style.display='block'; tip.style.left=(e.clientX+12)+'px'; tip.style.top=(e.clientY-10)+'px'; tip.innerHTML=content; found=true; break; } } if(!found) tip.style.display='none'; }; cv.onmouseleave=function(){ var tip=document.getElementById('gantt-tooltip'); if(tip)tip.style.display='none'; }; } function showGanttWODetail(wo, color){ var panel=document.getElementById('gantt-detail-panel'); if(!panel) return; var acts=GANTT_ACT_DATA[wo.id]||[]; var actLH=acts.reduce(function(s,a){return s+(a[7]||0);},0); // Sort acts by bl_finish to show which are pushing out the WO var sortedActs=acts.slice().sort(function(a,b){ return (a[3]||'').localeCompare(b[3]||''); }); // Find the critical act - latest bl_finish that is incomplete var criticalActs=sortedActs.filter(function(a){return a[9]!=='Complete'&&a[3];}); criticalActs.sort(function(a,b){return (b[3]||'').localeCompare(a[3]||'');}); var rows=sortedActs.map(function(a){ var isLate=a[3]&&a[3]>wo.bl_finish; var isCritical=criticalActs.length>0&&a[0]===criticalActs[0][0]; var statusColor=a[9]==='Complete'?'#388E3C':a[9]==='In Progress'?'#F57C00':'#888'; var pctBar=a[8]>0?'
':''; return '' +''+a[0]+'' +''+a[1].substring(0,35)+(a[1].length>35?'…':'')+'' +''+a[2]+'' +''+a[3]+'' +''+(a[4]||'—')+'' +''+(a[5]||'—')+'' +''+a[6]+'h' +''+a[7]+'h' +'' +''+a[9]+''+pctBar +'' +(isCritical?'⚠ pushing out':'') +''; }).join(''); panel.style.display='block'; panel.innerHTML='
' +'
' +'
' +'
'+wo.id+'
' +'
'+wo.name.substring(wo.id.length+2)+'
' +'
' +'Phase: '+wo.phase+'' +'BL finish: '+wo.bl_finish+'' +'Plan: '+wo.plan_lh+'h' +'Actual: '+Math.round(actLH)+'h' +'
' +'
' +'' +'
' +(criticalActs.length>0?'
' +'⚠ Activity pushing out this WO: '+criticalActs[0][0]+' — '+criticalActs[0][1].substring(0,60)+' (BL finish: '+criticalActs[0][3]+')' +'
':'') +'
' +'' +'' +'' +'' +'' +'' +'' +'' +'' +'' +'' +'' +'' +''+rows+'' +'

'; } function initGantt(){ renderGanttPhaseToggle(); renderGanttEditor(); renderGantt(); } // ══ END GANTT ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
